decks.notes: This deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo using Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II to create a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes various support cards like Fatal Push, Thoughtseize, and Guardian of New Benalia to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The goal is to quickly ramp up mana using lands like The Mycosynth Gardens and Monument to Endurance, while also utilizing cards like Vanishing Verse and Cling to Dust for removal and graveyard interaction. The deck aims to win through a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful combo plays.

The deck focuses on utilizing Niv-Mizzet Reborn as a powerful control engine, allowing the player to consistently draw cards and gain card advantage. With a diverse mana base and access to multiple colors, the deck can efficiently cast a variety of spells, including removal, counterspells, and powerful threats like Omnath, Locus of Creation. The inclusion of Bring to Light allows the player to tutor for important spells when needed. Overall, the deck aims to control the game through card advantage, powerful threats, and versatile answers to opposing strategies.

This deck focuses on quickly putting pressure on the opponent with efficient creatures and disruptive spells. By playing cards like Collected Company and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent while also hindering their ability to cast spells. With a combination of early game mana ramp and powerful threats like Archon of Emeria and Skyclave Apparition, the deck can quickly take control of the game and force the opponent onto the defensive. The inclusion of cards like Ouroboroid and Elspeth, Storm Slayer provide additional versatility and resilience to ensure victory.

This UR Aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Emberheart Challenger. It utilizes burn spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage to remove threats and push damage through. The deck also includes disruptive spells like Boomerang Basics and Academic Dispute to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect its creatures. The mana base is tailored to ensure consistent mana sources, allowing the deck to curve out efficiently and maintain pressure on the opponent.

The deck focuses on utilizing the combo of Greasefang and Parhelion II to overwhelm the opponent. It includes various support cards like Iron-Shield Elf, Guardian of New Benalia, and Monument to Endurance to protect and boost the combo pieces. The deck also includes disruption cards such as Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the board. The mana base is optimized with lands like Godless Shrine, Concealed Courtyard, and Urborg, Tomb of Yawgmoth. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and dominate the game.

This Jund Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying low-cost creatures like Cauldron Familiar and Bloodtithe Harvester, using cards like Witch's Oven and Mayhem Devil to generate incremental value and chip away at the opponent's life total. It also includes removal spells like Fatal Push and Abrade to control the board, as well as some card draw and ramp with cards like Scavenger's Talent and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures, removal, and value-generating effects.

This deck focuses on utilizing a mix of creature removal, hand disruption, and graveyard manipulation to control the game and outvalue opponents. It aims to establish board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Duress. The inclusion of cards like Graveyard Trespasser and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse allows for graveyard recursion and additional value. Overall, the deck aims to grind out victories through attrition and resource management.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Cori-Steel Cutter. The deck also utilizes spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage to remove threats and maintain board control. Additionally, the deck includes card draw and spell recursion with cards like Consider and Academic Dispute, allowing for consistency and flexibility in gameplay. The mana base is optimized for early game aggression with a mix of Mountains and land cards that provide both red and blue mana sources.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the Greasefang Parhelion combo, utilizing cards like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize to control the board and ensure a successful combo execution. The deck also includes protection and support cards such as Iron-Shield Elf and Monument to Endurance to help maintain board presence and protect the combo pieces. The land base is carefully constructed to support the deck's strategy and ensure consistency in executing the combo.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to apply pressure early in the game with cheap and efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, supported by burn spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage to control the board. The deck also utilizes card draw and selection to maintain a consistent hand size and find key cards when needed. The inclusion of spells like Academic Dispute and Stock Up provide additional utility and versatility in combat situations. Overall, this deck aims to maintain a fast tempo while controlling the battlefield to secure victory.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Greasefang and Parhelion II to create a powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent. This is supported by cards like Monument to Endurance to protect the combo pieces, along with removal spells like Fatal Push and Vanishing Verse to control the board. Additionally, Thoughtseize is included to disrupt the opponent's game plan and ensure the combo can be safely assembled. Overall, the deck aims to win through a quick and efficient combo while maintaining control over the game.

The main concept of this Orzhov Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's strategy through hand disruption with cards like Thoughtseize, removal spells such as Fatal Push and Vanishing Verse, and controlling the board with cards like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse and Preacher of the Schism. The deck aims to maintain a strong presence on the battlefield with creatures like Gifted Aetherborn and eventually close out the game with powerful finishers like Archfiend of the Dross. The deck also utilizes lands like Mutavault and Godless Shrine to support its strategy and ensure mana consistency.

The deck focuses on assembling the combo of Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II to create a powerful board presence. It includes cards like Monument to Endurance and Fleeting Spirit to support and protect the combo pieces. The deck also includes a variety of removal spells like Fatal Push and Vanishing Verse to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Overall, the key strategy is to quickly assemble the combo pieces while disrupting the opponent's game plan to secure victory.

This deck focuses on assembling the Greasefang Parhelion combo, which involves using Greasefang, Okiba Boss to sacrifice creatures like Iron-Shield Elf and Fleeting Spirit to create Angel tokens with lifelink from Parhelion II. The deck also includes removal spells like Fatal Push and disruption like Thoughtseize to control the board. Monument to Endurance and Sheltered by Ghosts help protect key creatures, while Guardian of New Benalia provides additional value. The land base includes utility lands like Bleachbone Verge and The Mycosynth Gardens to support the combo strategy.

This Selesnya Aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy, utilizing cards like Archon of Emeria and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben to slow down the opponent while deploying threats like Skyclave Apparition and Aven Interrupter. The deck also includes cards like Collected Company and Michelangelo's Technique to generate card advantage and maintain pressure on the opponent. With efficient mana dorks like Llanowar Elves and Elvish Mystic, this deck aims to quickly establish a board presence and push for a swift victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing Niv-Mizzet Reborn as a powerful control engine, drawing cards and providing value with its unique ability. The deck includes a toolbox of versatile cards that can be fetched with Bring to Light, helping to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Additionally, the inclusion of Leyline Binding and other removal spells helps to deal with threats while setting up the win condition through card advantage and powerful late-game plays. The deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents through careful resource management and strategic decision-making.
